name: soropool
description: Automated Market Maker & Liquidity Pool Protocol on Stellar Soroban

scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.test: cd contracts && cargo test && cd ../backend && npm run test && cd ../frontend && npm run test:ci
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../contracts && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
scripts.clean: docker compose down -v && rm -rf backend/dist frontend/dist
